title: Day 26 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
Day 26 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition

The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:  

Sentence 1 - かれは　みなとくに　すんで　います。= He lives in Minato ward.

Sentence 2 - かれは　たかい　くるまを　もって　います。= He owns an expensive car.

Sentence 3 - かれは　けっこんして　います。=  He is married.

Sentence 4 - うえださんは　かれを　よく　しって　いますね。= Ueda knows him well.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
